content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Mission Loans: Retail Loan Officer Nevada Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5540/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://missionloans.com">http://missionloans.com</a> </p> <div class="col col-xs-7 description"> <p><span><span><span>Mission Loans is looking for <b>Remote Retail Loan Officers</b> to join our growing&nbsp; team. This is an exciting opportunity for motivated professionals who thrive on building strong relationships with realtors and referral partners, self-generating leads, and managing the loan process from first contact to closing. Whether you’re an experienced licensed originator or a highly driven individual, we are willing to train you and provide the tools, support, and resources to help you grow your business and succeed in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. Your mission is to deliver a best-in-class customer experience by guiding clients through the mortgage process, helping them choose the right loan product, and ensuring on-time closings.</span><br><br><span><b>RESPONSIBILITIES:</b></span></span></span></p><ul><li><span><span><span>Proactively <b>self-generate mortgage leads</b> through networking, prospecting, and relationship development.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Cultivate and maintain a strong network of <b>realtors, builders, and other referral sources</b> to drive new purchase business.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Guide borrowers through every step of the loan process with professionalism and clear communication.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Analyze borrower credit, income, and assets to recommend appropriate loan products.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Collaborate closely with processing, underwriting, and closing teams to ensure timely and compliant loan closings.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Stay current on <b>mortgage products, lending guidelines,</b> and market trends.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Represent the company at community and industry events to expand visibility and grow your referral network.</span></span></span></li></ul><br><span><span><span><b>QUALIFICATIONS:</b></span></span></span><ul><li><span><span><span>High school diploma or equivalent required; <b>Bachelor’s degree</b> in finance, business, or related field preferred.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><b>Active NMLS license</b> and all required state licensing.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><b>Minimum 2 years of recent loan origination experience</b> in a <b>purchase-driven, self-sourced environment.</b></span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Proven ability to build and maintain referral relationships that consistently generate funded volume.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Strong understanding of <b>Conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, and Jumbo</b> products.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Excellent <b>sales, communication, and relationship-building</b> skills.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Proficient in <b>loan origination systems (e.g., Byte, Encompass, or similar)</b> and standard business software.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><b>Highly self-motivated and entrepreneurial</b> — thrives working independently, managing daily activities, and driving results without direct supervision.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Strong organizational skills with the ability to <b>prioritize multiple files and meet deadlines</b> in a fast-paced environment.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Experience preferred but not required; training provided for motivated, high-potential candidates.</span></span></span></li></ul><br><span><span><span><b>WHAT WE OFFER:</b></span></span></span><ul><li><span><span><span>Competitive <b>commission-based compensation plan</b> with high earning potential.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Access to a broad portfolio of loan products and competitive pricing.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><b>Company paid marketing</b> and operational support to help you scale your business.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Strong, collaborative company culture focused on growth and customer experience.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Industry</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span>Backed by <b>exceptional operations support</b> that ensures every file moves seamlessly from first touch to closing, fast, accurate, and always on time.</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><b>Dedicated, company-paid marketing partner- </b>an assigned expert to help you scale your business with open house materials, drip campaigns, text messaging, social media content, websites, co-branded resources, and more!</span></span></span></li><li><span><span><span><b>Pre-qualification without impact-</b> our soft credit pulls let you evaluate borrowers without affecting their credit score, helping you provide faster, more accurate guidance.</span></span></span></li></ul><p><span><span><span><b><i>*This is a Commission-only position offering unlimited earning potential.</i></b></span></span></span><br><br><span><span><span><b><i>Notice to Agencies:</i></b><i> Mission Loans, LLC. (the "Company") has an internal recruiting department. Mission Loans, LLC may supplement that internal capability from time to time with assistance from temporary staffing agencies, placement services, and professional recruiters ("Agency"). Agencies are hereby specifically directed NOT to contact Mission Loans, LLC. employees directly in an attempt to present candidates. The Company’s policy is for the internal recruiting team or other authorized personnel to present ALL candidates to hiring managers. Any uns
